calendar.matters:
Petition For Determination Of Non-Liability Of Trust For Creditor'S Claim
Off Calendar May-08-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Lee Kaster, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for Phillip Goldberg, Petitioner.
Leo LaRocca, Esq., in person, for and with Steven Brattesani, Respondent.

At the outset, the court advises that it intends to take this petition off calendar in favor of the related civil case filed by respondent Steven Brattesani against petitioner Phillip Goldberg. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the court's intention.

After additional discussion, the court takes the matter under submission. Counsel is advised that the court intends to issue an order re this matter.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Thompson. Not Reported.

Petition For Determination Of Non-Liability Of Trust For Creditor'S Claim
Off Calendar Apr-01-2025 Continued To May-06-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
